messages.title: 🚀 v33.0: Say Goodbye to Manual Updates!
messages.body:
I'm thrilled to introduce seamless, automatic updates using the official Itch.io Desktop App! No more downloading .zip files or replacing folders manually. Once set up, your extension will automatically download and reload itself whenever a new version drops.

Version 33.0 also comes packed with some major UI repolishing and visual improvements that I hope you'll enjoy!

Please read the Updating section of the User Guide for quick instructions on how to migrate to the new system. (And if you prefer the old way, don't worry. You can still do manual updates just like before!)
